channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Claims Divine Endorsement for U.S. Actions in Iran Conflict
item.description: In a recent statement during a press briefing about the ongoing military actions between the United States and Iran, former President Donald Trump asserted that 'God supports the United States' in its...

item.title: Siaya MCA Impeachment Bid Sparks Debate Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Drama is unfolding in Siaya County as Member of Parliament Samuel Atandi has strongly urged the County Assembly Members (MCAs) to rethink their efforts to impeach Governor James Orengo. Atandi's plea ...

item.title: Philstar.com Login and Registration Updates
item.description: Philstar.com, a prominent online news platform in the Philippines, recently updated its login and registration processes. The update reminds users of options for logging in, including a prompt to conf...

item.title: Waitrose faces criticism after dismissing long-serving employee over shoplifting incident
item.description: A veteran Waitrose employee, Walker Smith, aged 54, was dismissed after confronting a shoplifter attempting to steal a bag of Easter eggs from the supermarket’s Clapham Junction branch in London. Smit...

item.title: Rivers State Plans to Regulate Car Dealerships to Restore Port Harcourt’s Garden City Image
item.description: The Rivers State Government don show serious intention to restore Port Harcourt to the original Garden City status through proper regulation of car dealerships. The State Commissioner for Physical Pla...

item.title: U.S. Analyst Predicts Intensified Air Strikes on Iran Early This Week
item.description: In a live update shared by The Wall Street Journal’s coverage of the escalating conflict involving Iran, commentator Pete Hegseth stated that Monday and Tuesday are expected to see the highest volume ...

item.title: Rapid Urbanisation in Kyumbi Straining Infrastructure and Livelihoods
item.description: Kyumbi, a once quiet trading centre in Machakos County, has transformed rapidly into a bustling town due to its strategic position along the Nairobi–Mombasa Highway. The growth has brought new busines...

item.title: AmaZulu and Sekhukhune share points in Betway Premiership, Chiefs remain third
item.description: AmaZulu missed a crucial chance to reclaim third spot in the Betway Premiership on Sunday evening at Princess Magogo Stadium, Durban, as they drew 2-2 with Sekhukhune United. Thapelo Matlhoko opened t...

item.title: Trump signals willingness to end conflict in Iran amid public pressure for troop withdrawal
item.description: US President Donald Trump has indicated that he may be ready to end the conflict with Iran, acknowledging that Americans want their troops to come home. Speaking ahead of a news conference in Washingt...

item.title: Trump Gives Familiar Speech at White House Easter Egg Roll
item.description: At the White House Easter Egg Roll on April 6, 2026, President Donald Trump delivered a speech that largely repeated themes from his previous addresses. Speaking to families gathered on the South Lawn...

item.title: High Court overturns businessman’s rape conviction citing inconsistencies in witness testimony
item.description: The Pretoria High Court recently overturned the rape conviction of Ekurhuleni businessman Pule Mokou, originally handed down by the Benoni Magistrate’s Court in February 2023. The ruling followed conc...

item.title: Peter Broelman's latest cartoon offers humorous commentary on current events
item.description: The Canberra Times presents another edition of its daily editorial cartoon feature by Australian cartoonist Peter Broelman. Titled 'Peter Broelman's view: Miracles ...', the piece captures recent news...

item.title: The Alibi: Stella Recalls Events Leading Up to Walter's Death
item.description: In Episode 14 of 'The Alibi,' Stella Morales confronts fragmented memories of the night preceding Walter’s death. The episode focuses on her attempt to piece together the events and recall any clues t...

item.title: Artemis II Mission Progresses Toward Historic Lunar Far Side Flyby
item.description: Artemis II, NASA’s second crewed mission in the Artemis program, is approaching the far side of the moon, marking a significant milestone in human space exploration. While the mission will not involve...

item.title: Kim Chiu and Paulo Avelino Discuss Relationship Boundaries and Deal Breakers
item.description: In a revealing conversation, Kim Chiu and Paulo Avelino opened up about their views on love, relationships, and what they consider deal breakers in romantic partnerships. The two stars shared personal...

item.title: Cameroon’s Succession Plan: President Biyá Appoints Son as Vice-President
item.description: Mzee Paul Biya, the president of Cameroon, ameshifanya kitendo cha kusisimua sana. Ameamua kumteua mwanaye, Franck Emmanuel Biya, kuwa Naibu Raisi. Hii ni mara ya kwanza toka mwaka 1972 nafasi hii ima...

item.title: Bang & Olufsen Unveils $520,000 Beolab 90 Speakers for Its 100th Anniversary
item.description: To commemorate its 100th anniversary, Bang & Olufsen has introduced a stunning special edition of its Beolab 90 speakers—a true fusion of design innovation and acoustic mastery. Priced at an astonishi...

item.title: Delhi Assembly breach: Unfolding events leading to a bouquet
item.description: In a series of unusual events, the Delhi Assembly witnessed a breach that raised many questions. It began with an unknown car entering the premises, followed by a bouquet being handed over during a hi...

item.title: Trump discusses US-Iran negotiations via intermediaries in Pakistan amid threat of escalation
item.description: US President Donald Trump made statements indicating that Iran could be targeted in a single night, specifying that such action might occur as soon as tomorrow. At the same time, he mentioned that Vic...

item.title: ADC accuses INEC of blocking party from fielding 2027 election candidates
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don raise alarm say Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) dey try put wahala for their way to stop dem from fielding candidates for 2027 elections. Acc...
